rationale: The only match evidence is a DOI-level reference (10.1509/jmr.10.0029) with no in-text citation context, so there is no direct signal of how the 2022 paper uses it. While both papers concern advertising dynamics, the cited work focuses on normative spatiotemporal budget allocation (national/regional HJB model) whereas the citing study estimates sequential ad-variety effects on mobile CTR, making substantive dependence plausible but unconfirmed from current evidence.
